seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by World of Books Ltd.
description: From the Publisher School edition of Shakespeare's Macbeth Ideal for classroom learning, this edition features: - Clear, accessible notes and commentaries with detailed explanations of difficult words and passages - Photographs from theatre productions offering alternative interpretations and staging ideas - A two column format , making reference-checking and explanations more immediate Suitable for all exam boards and the most recent English Literature specifications.
